hero.headline: The concrete crew *Rock Hill trusts*
hero.subheadline: Driveways, patios, foundations — built to last decades, not years.

services.title: Driveways & Walkways
services.description: New pours and repairs that handle Carolina weather and daily wear.

services.title: Patios & Slabs
services.description: Level, reinforced concrete for outdoor living and storage spaces.

services.title: Foundation Work
services.description: Footings, slabs, and foundation repairs for residential projects.

services.title: Concrete Repair
services.description: Crack repair, resurfacing, and restoration of existing concrete.

about.heading: Built on Referrals
about.body: We're a Rock Hill concrete team that shows up when we say we will. One call, one crew, one job done right.

reviews.name: Doreen I.
reviews.text: JR and his crews made our garage-to-family-room dream come true. Quality workmanship throughout the project.

reviews.name: Jennifer H.
reviews.text: Went above and beyond in every aspect of the job! Highly recommend.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA

cta.heading: Ready to Pour?
cta.body: Free estimates on all concrete work. Call today and we'll walk your project with you.
